title: Now-Next-Later vision / roadmap from interview synthesis
use_when: Now-Next-Later vision / roadmap from interview synthesis. Use when the user needs a product workflow for product strategy related to now-next-later vision / roadmap from interview synthesis. Trigger terms: interviews, research-synthesis, product-strategy, roadmapping, vision.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Now-Next-Later vision / roadmap from interview synthesis when the request is mainly delivery planning, analytics readout, or stakeholder communication; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: Now-Next-Later vision / roadmap from interview synthesis research brief with evidence, insight clusters, assumptions, and next validation steps
framework_fit: Now-Next-Later vision / roadmap from interview synthesis fits Discovery work in the Discover lifecycle when the user needs Now-Next-Later vision / roadmap from interview synthesis research brief with evidence, insight clusters, assumptions, and next validation steps and has enough product context to make tradeoffs explicit. Use it to produce a decision-ready artifact, not a framework tour.
failure_modes: Produces Now-Next-Later vision / roadmap from interview synthesis research brief with evidence, insight clusters, assumptions, and next validation steps without tying recommendations to the user's Discover stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Now-Next-Later vision / roadmap from interview synthesis as generic Discovery advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Now-Next-Later vision / roadmap from interview synthesis when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $now-next-later-vision-roadmap-from-interview-synthesis to turn this now context into a decision-ready Now-Next-Later vision / roadmap from interview synthesis research brief with evidence, insight clusters, assumptions, and next validation steps.
examples.expected_artifact: Now-Next-Later vision / roadmap from interview synthesis research brief with evidence, insight clusters, assumptions, and next validation steps
